g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is Data Validation in AI V&V?')
g.text: Is the data clean, complete, unbiased?

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is Model Validation in AI V&V?')
g.text: Does the model give correct results?

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is data labeling and preprocessing in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is Training Validation in AI V&V?')
sendPrompt('What is data bias assessment in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is overfitting in AI models?')
g.text: Works on new data, not just training?

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is data privacy and anonymization in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is robustness testing in AI models?')
sendPrompt('What is data completeness in AI training?')
sendPrompt('What is deployment validation in AI?')

g.text: Both must pass to approve AI
